steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “too delicate to be trodden upon by rough feet” reveals what “delicate” means — something easily damaged or harmed by being stepped on.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Fragile directly expresses this vulnerability — something easily broken or damaged. The other three don't describe how something would be ruined by rough treatment. That matches choice B — B is correct.
